title: hieracium pallescens subsp. incisum
intro: Hieracium pallescens subsp. incisum, commonly known as the yellow hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family that is native to the western United States. The medicinal properties of Hieracium pallescens subsp. incisum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Hieracium pallescens subsp. incisum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
